items.summary: Revert the backend (backend/main.mo) to its Draft Version 15 state, restoring all types, persistent state definitions, and query/update methods (inventory, transactions, work orders, shop settings, user profiles, reports, and access control) exactly as they were in that version.

Revert CashierPage (frontend/src/pages/CashierPage.tsx) to its Draft Version 15 state, restoring all component dependencies, UI layout, cart logic, and transaction completion flow as specified in the feature evidence report.

Revert InventoryPage (frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx) to its Draft Version 15 state, restoring all component dependencies, search, stock management, low-stock indicators, and Excel import/export features as specified in the feature evidence report.

Revert ServicePage (frontend/src/pages/ServicePage.tsx) to its Draft Version 15 state, restoring all component dependencies, work order creation/completion/deletion flow, search, and cashier navigation as specified in the feature evidence report.
